pageContent.channelTitle: Nico Maggioli / Design Lab / Live Work Archive
pageContent.channelSubtitle: Creative strategy, visual identity, and 3D-driven systems. This board is a collection of my work throughout the years.
pageContent.ogDescription: Personal portfolio gallery by Nico Maggioli.

mainProjects.title: Boreal
mainProjects.description: Creative strategy and visual identity for a cold-weather apparel brand.
mainProjects.fullDescription: A comprehensive brand identity project for Boreal, featuring logo design, color palette, typography system, and brand guidelines.

mainProjects.title: Nestquest
mainProjects.description: Digital product design for a real estate discovery platform.
mainProjects.fullDescription: End-to-end product design for a modern real estate platform focused on user experience and visual appeal.

mainProjects.title: Peak
mainProjects.description: Visual identity and 3D campaign for an outdoor performance brand.
mainProjects.fullDescription: Complete 3D-driven campaign for Peak's new product line launch.

mainProjects.title: Cognis
mainProjects.description: Brand system and web experience for an AI research lab.
mainProjects.fullDescription: Futuristic brand identity for an AI research laboratory.

mainProjects.fullDescription: Premium packaging design for luxury pet care products.

mainProjects.title: Mirage

mainProjects.fullDescription: Personal exploration of light, form, and surreal environments.

mainProjects.title: OXA

mainProjects.fullDescription: Complete brand system for an emerging technology company.
